title: Spaghetti with Meat Sauce
description: Hearty spaghetti with a rich, slow-simmered meat sauce made from ground beef, crushed tomatoes, and Italian seasonings.

ingredients.note: or a mix of beef and mild Italian sausage

ingredients.item: grated Parmesan cheese and fresh basil

steps.instruction: Heat olive oil in a large, deep skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add diced onion and cook 5–6 minutes until softened and translucent.
Add garlic and cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add ground beef (and sausage if using). Cook over medium-high heat, breaking into fine pieces, until browned and cooked through. Drain excess fat.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, to caramelize slightly.
Add crushed tomatoes, broth or wine, Italian seasoning, sugar, red pepper flakes if using, salt, and pepper. Stir well.
Reduce heat to low. Simmer uncovered for 25–30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thickened and flavors are developed.
Meanwhile, cook spaghetti in generously salted boiling water according to package directions until al dente. Reserve ½ cup pasta cooking water before draining.
Add drained pasta directly to the sauce in the pan. Toss well, adding a splash of pasta water if needed to loosen the sauce.
Serve in bowls. Top with fresh basil and grated Parmesan.

notes: Adding pasta water to the sauce helps it cling beautifully to every strand of spaghetti. The starch in the water acts as a natural binder.
